items.title: Protect up to 15 devices with FastestVPN PRO for only $40 (Reg. up to $600)
items.summary:
A basic VPN plan feels reasonable right up until it has to deal with a real house. One phone becomes two. Then there’s a laptop, a work laptop, a tablet, a streaming box, a game console, maybe a router, maybe a smart TV, and suddenly the “five devices should be enough” logic falls apart. FastestVPN PRO at just $39.99 for a limited time (reg. $600) is easier to picture in that kind of setup because it covers up to 15 devices, which is a much less fantasy-based number.

more…

items.title: Review: Latest ECOVACS DEEBOT X12 OmniCyclone robot vac and mop
items.summary:
ECOVACS – one of my personal favorite robot cleaner brands – unleashed its new DEEBOT X12 OmniCyclone robot vac and mop system this year, and I have now had a chance to put it to the test. I have, generally speaking, come away quite impressed once again, with a few minor grips on the dust bin design and new stain removing prowess, and I’m not sure it’s worth the upgrade for folks with a relatively modern solution already, but I think this is a vacuum worth consideration for just about anyone looking to get into the flagship robot cleaning space – it is also $250 off right now.
